name: HiQuake: The Human-Induced Earthquake Database
provider: Durham University / Newcastle University / HiQuake team
theme_raw: Human-induced earthquake database
coverage: global
license: open-access website; database freely downloadable, rights statement not explicit on landing page
formats: XLSX, DOCX bibliography, web map
access: direct-download
doi_or_citation: Wilson et al. (2017), Seismological Research Letters; Foulger et al. (2018), Earth-Science Reviews; Wilkinson et al. (2024), Scientific Reports
notes: Backbone source for claimed industrial projects that induced or triggered earthquakes; includes project types such as mining, reservoir impoundment, oil and gas, geothermal, waste-fluid disposal, nuclear explosions, construction, chemical explosions, groundwater extraction and CCS.
desc_zh: HiQuake 是目前最核心的全球人工诱发/触发地震项目数据库，按项目记录人类活动与地震序列之间的科学证据。官网显示 2025-12-18 更新，数据可下载为 Excel，并提供相关 bibliography。它适合作为人工地震线索总表，但每条案例仍需结合原始文献判断证据强度。
desc_en: HiQuake is the main global compilation of industrial projects proposed on scientific grounds to have induced or triggered earthquakes. The site reports a 2025-12-18 update, downloadable Excel data, a bibliography, and project classes spanning mining, reservoirs, oil and gas, geothermal, waste-fluid disposal, nuclear explosions, construction, chemical explosions, groundwater extraction, CCS and related activities. It is best used as a backbone index whose individual cases can be followed back to source literature.
evidence: Landing page states largest up-to-date human-induced earthquake database and free Microsoft Excel download; categories and project count shown on site.
feature_count: 1377 projects shown on landing page

name: Global physics-based database of injection-induced seismicity
provider: Digital.CSIC / GEoREST project
theme_raw: Geo-energy injection-induced seismicity
coverage: global
formats: CSV, XLS, DOCX data dictionary and references
access: direct-download
doi_or_citation: Kivi et al. (2022), Digital.CSIC, https://doi.org/10.20350/digitalCSIC/14813; Kivi et al. (2023), Earth System Science Data
notes: Multi-physical database for injection-induced seismicity from geothermal, shale gas, underground gas storage, wastewater disposal and research projects; not just event locations but 71 variables across site, operations and seismic response.
desc_zh: 该库汇编全球注入诱发地震案例，覆盖地热、页岩气、地下储气、废水处置和研究注入项目。ESSD 论文说明它包含 158 个项目或阶段、约 4000 条数据项、71 个变量，并以 CSV/XLS 等扁平格式开放。它比单纯震中目录更适合研究注入参数、地质条件和地震响应之间的关系。
desc_en: This Digital.CSIC release is a global multi-physical database of injection-induced seismicity. It covers geothermal, shale gas, underground gas storage, wastewater disposal and research projects, with 158 cases or project phases, about 4000 entries and 71 variables described in the ESSD data paper. The flat CSV/XLS release is useful for linking operations, geological setting, fault attributes and recorded seismic activity.
evidence: ESSD data-availability section points to Digital.CSIC DOI and states .xls/.csv files, CC BY 4.0, 158 cases and 71 parameters.
feature_count: 158 cases; 71 variables; nearly 4000 entries

name: USGS Earthquake catalogs compiled for the National Seismic Hazard Models
provider: U.S. Geological Survey
theme_raw: NSHM catalogs with induced flags
coverage: conterminous United States
formats: catalog files, metadata, ScienceBase child items
access: direct-download via ScienceBase
doi_or_citation: Mueller, C.S. (2018), USGS data release, https://doi.org/10.5066/F7P26X4R
time_span: through 2016 for the released catalog set
notes: Parent ScienceBase release with child catalogs including central/eastern U.S. induced catalogs, natural+induced catalogs, declustered variants and western U.S. catalogs. It deletes explosions and mining-related earthquakes while flagging induced earthquakes for hazard modeling.
desc_zh: 这是 USGS 为国家地震危险性模型整理的一组目录发布，包含美国本土多个处理阶段的地震目录。目录统一了矩震级和建模参数，删除爆炸与采矿相关事件，并对诱发地震进行标记。它是理解美国危险性模型如何处理诱发地震的权威入口。
desc_en: This USGS ScienceBase release provides earthquake catalogs used in U.S. National Seismic Hazard Models. It assembles pre-existing catalogs, computes moment magnitudes and rate-model parameters, removes explosions and mining-related events, and flags induced earthquakes. The parent item links to CEUS induced, natural-plus-induced, declustered and western U.S. catalog variants.
evidence: ScienceBase summary describes catalog assembly, induced flags and child catalog structure; DOI is 10.5066/F7P26X4R.
feature_count: 14 child items

name: Central and eastern U.S. catalog of induced earthquakes without duplicates
provider: U.S. Geological Survey
theme_raw: CEUS induced earthquakes without duplicates
coverage: central and eastern United States
formats: catalog table, metadata
access: direct-download via DOI/ScienceBase
doi_or_citation: Mueller, C.S. (2018), https://doi.org/10.5066/F7P26X4R
notes: Specific child catalog of induced earthquakes for the CEUS; distinct from the parent multi-catalog release.
desc_zh: 该 USGS 数据集是美国中东部诱发地震去重目录，服务于地震危险性分析。页面说明目录由多个既有目录组合、统一震级参数、去重，并保留诱发地震目录本身。它是美国废水注入等诱发地震研究常用的事件级基础数据。
desc_en: This USGS item is the central and eastern U.S. catalog of induced earthquakes without duplicates. It is a specific child product within the NSHM catalog release, assembled from multiple source catalogs with uniform moment magnitudes and parameters used for unbiased seismicity-rate estimation. It is a clean event-level input for induced-seismicity hazard work in the CEUS.
evidence: USGS Science Data Catalog states this is the CEUS induced-earthquake catalog without duplicates and gives the 1962-2016 data span.

name: USGS catalog of natural and induced earthquakes without duplicates
provider: U.S. Geological Survey
theme_raw: Natural and induced earthquakes without duplicates
coverage: United States
formats: catalog table, metadata
access: direct-download via DOI/ScienceBase
doi_or_citation: Mueller, C.S. (2018), https://doi.org/10.5066/F7Cf9PC4
notes: Mixed natural and induced catalog with fields indicating induced/natural and dependent/independent event status. Explosions and mining events are deleted, so this is not a blast catalog.
desc_zh: 该目录混合收录天然和诱发地震，并在事件记录中标识事件是诱发还是天然、独立还是依赖事件。USGS 页面说明该目录用于 2016、2017、2018 年短期危险性预报，且已删除爆炸和采矿相关事件。它适合用于从统一目录中筛出诱发地震并与天然背景对比。
desc_en: This USGS release is a natural-plus-induced earthquake catalog without duplicates, with fields that identify whether each event is considered induced or natural and dependent or independent. It supports short-term hazard forecasts that account for induced earthquakes, while explosions and mining-related events have been removed. It is useful when induced events must be compared against natural background seismicity.
evidence: USGS catalog page states induced/natural and dependent/independent fields and dates 1568-2017.

name: USGS 2018 One-Year CEUS Seismic Hazard Forecast data release from induced and natural earthquakes
provider: U.S. Geological Survey
theme_canonical: Induced seismic hazard model inputs and outputs
theme_raw: 2018 one-year CEUS induced and natural forecast
coverage: central and eastern United States
formats: catalogs, hazard curves, maps, ScienceBase services
access: direct-download, WMS
doi_or_citation: Petersen et al. (2018), USGS data release, https://doi.org/10.5066/F7Cf9PC4
time_span: validity year 2018; includes catalog and model inputs
notes: Forecast product rather than raw-only catalog; accepted because the release includes seismicity catalog used for the forecast and explicit induced-earthquake hazard data.
desc_zh: 这是 USGS 2018 年美国中东部一年期地震危险性预报数据发布，明确同时考虑诱发和天然地震。页面列出地震目录、危险性曲线、MMI、概率地震动图等子项，并说明 2008-2015 年 M≥3 地震率快速增长后近年下降。它适合作为诱发地震危险性模型输入/输出数据入口。
desc_en: This USGS release supports the 2018 one-year probabilistic hazard forecast for the central and eastern United States from induced and natural earthquakes. It includes the seismicity catalog used in the forecast, hazard-curve data, mapped ground-motion products and related services. The item is model-oriented, but it is accepted because it contains explicit induced-seismicity inputs and outputs.
evidence: ScienceBase page lists the 2018 induced-and-natural forecast, catalog child item and hazard data products.
feature_count: 7 child items

name: USGS 2017 CEUS short-term seismic hazard model earthquake catalogs
provider: U.S. Geological Survey
theme_raw: 2017 short-term CEUS catalogs
coverage: central and eastern United States
formats: catalog tables, metadata
access: direct-download via ScienceBase
doi_or_citation: Mueller, C.S. (2017), https://doi.org/10.5066/F7KP80B9
time_span: validity year 2017; catalogs built from prior source catalogs
notes: Contains master, natural+induced, induced-only, natural-only and declustered variants for the 2017 CEUS model.
desc_zh: 该 USGS ScienceBase 项提供 2017 年美国中东部短期地震危险性模型所用目录。子项包括总目录、天然+诱发目录、诱发地震目录、天然地震目录和去丛集版本。它是追溯 2017 年诱发地震危险性建模输入的重要版本化资料。
desc_en: This ScienceBase release contains the earthquake catalogs used for the 2017 central and eastern U.S. short-term seismic hazard model. Child items include the master catalog, natural-plus-induced catalog, induced-only catalog, natural-only catalog and declustered variants. It is a versioned source for the 2017 induced-seismicity hazard workflow.
evidence: ScienceBase page lists 8 child catalog items including induced-only and declustered induced catalog variants.
feature_count: 8 child items

name: 2023 U.S. National Seismic Hazard Model induced seismicity zones
provider: U.S. Geological Survey
theme_raw: NSHM 2023 induced seismicity polygons
coverage: conterminous United States
formats: Shapefile, JSON, CSV tables, WMS, WFS
access: direct-download, WMS, WFS
doi_or_citation: Petersen et al. (2023), USGS data release, https://doi.org/10.5066/P9GNPCOD
notes: Polygon zones, not earthquake events; accepted because the data explicitly document regions and durations of induced seismicity used in the national hazard model.
desc_zh: 该数据发布提供 2023 年美国 50 州国家地震危险性模型中的诱发地震区边界及属性表。数据以 Shapefile、JSON、CSV 表、WMS/WFS 等形式提供，记录了被认为具有诱发地震活动的区域和持续时间。它不是事件目录，而是危险性模型中的空间分区数据。
desc_en: This USGS item provides the polygon boundaries and tables for induced seismicity zones in the 2023 U.S. 50-State National Seismic Hazard Model. The release includes Shapefile, JSON, CSV tables and WMS/WFS services. It is not an event catalog, but it is a direct geospatial representation of induced-seismicity source zones used in national hazard modeling.
evidence: ScienceBase summary states boundaries and tables of induced seismicity zones; attached files include shapefile, JSON and CSV tables.
file_size: tables 8.23 KB; shapefile components listed individually

name: USGS database of ground motion intensity measurements from induced earthquakes in Oklahoma and Kansas
provider: U.S. Geological Survey
theme_raw: Instrumentally recorded ground motion intensity measurements
coverage: Oklahoma and Kansas, United States
formats: ZIP, text, XML metadata
access: direct-download via ScienceBase
doi_or_citation: Moschetti et al. (2017), USGS data release, https://doi.org/10.5066/F73B5X8N
notes: Ground-motion intensity database for more than 3,800 M>=3 induced earthquakes; useful for engineering analyses, not a complete microseismicity catalog.
desc_zh: 该 USGS 数据库整理了俄克拉荷马和堪萨斯诱发地震的仪器记录地震动强度量。页面说明事件集包含 2009-2016 年超过 3800 个 M≥3 地震，并给出峰值水平地震动和 5% 阻尼反应谱加速度等指标。它适合做诱发地震地震动模型和工程影响分析。
desc_en: This USGS release contains uniformly processed ground-motion intensity measurements for induced earthquakes in Oklahoma and Kansas. The event set includes more than 3,800 M>=3 earthquakes from 2009 through 2016, with peak horizontal ground motions and 5%-damped pseudospectral accelerations. It is an engineering-oriented companion to event catalogs rather than a complete microseismicity inventory.
evidence: ScienceBase summary and attached files list data ZIP and metadata for induced-earthquake ground-motion measurements.
feature_count: more than 3,800 M>=3 events

name: USGS data for ground motions from induced earthquakes in Oklahoma and Kansas
provider: U.S. Geological Survey
theme_raw: Ground motion residuals and periods
coverage: Oklahoma and Kansas, United States
formats: ZIP, TXT, XML metadata
access: direct-download via ScienceBase
doi_or_citation: Moschetti, M.P. (2018), USGS data release, https://doi.org/10.5066/P9SYGJPQ
notes: A compact data release with magnitudes, distances, periods and ground-motion residuals for induced events.
desc_zh: 该 USGS 发布包含俄克拉荷马和堪萨斯诱发地震地震动分析所需的数据，包括震级、距离、周期以及相对于常用美国地震动模型的残差。它比事件目录更偏向地震动模型验证和残差分析。ScienceBase 页面提供数据压缩包和 README。
desc_en: This USGS data release provides magnitudes, distances, oscillator periods and ground-motion residuals for induced earthquakes in Oklahoma and Kansas. It supports analysis against commonly used U.S. ground-shaking models. The ScienceBase item includes a small data ZIP and README.
evidence: ScienceBase summary states magnitudes, distances, periods and residuals; attached files include Data_Files.zip.

name: TexNet Earthquake Catalog
provider: Texas Seismological Network / Bureau of Economic Geology, University of Texas at Austin
theme_raw: Texas earthquake catalog
coverage: Texas, United States
formats: web map, downloadable data, likely CSV/API from catalog portal
access: web map, data download
doi_or_citation: TexNet Earthquake Catalog, Bureau of Economic Geology
notes: Texas catalog is not entirely human-caused, but TexNet was established to identify origins of Texas earthquakes including potentially human-caused events; key source for Permian/Delaware Basin induced seismicity.
desc_zh: TexNet 是得克萨斯州地震监测与研究网络，官网说明其任务包括识别地震起源、处理可能由人类活动造成的地震，并向公众发布数据。TexNet Earthquake Catalog 提供自 2017-01-01 起的得州地震记录和台站信息。它是研究西得州油气活动相关诱发地震的重要区域数据入口。
desc_en: TexNet is the Texas Seismological Network and seismology research program at the Bureau of Economic Geology. The program was tasked with identifying earthquake origins in Texas, including cases potentially caused by human activity, and distributing data to government, industry and the public. Its earthquake catalog contains records since 2017 and is a key access point for induced-seismicity studies in Texas oil and gas regions.
evidence: TexNet homepage states the catalog records Texas earthquakes since 2017 and links a download-data page.

name: Oklahoma Geological Survey earthquake catalogs
provider: Oklahoma Geological Survey, University of Oklahoma
theme_raw: Oklahoma earthquake catalogs
coverage: Oklahoma, United States
formats: CSV and other downloadable catalog formats
access: direct-download
doi_or_citation: Oklahoma Geological Survey earthquake catalogs
time_span: 1897-present depending on magnitude threshold; yearly/range catalogs
notes: Not every event is anthropogenic, but the Oklahoma catalog is a core regional source for the major wastewater-disposal induced seismicity sequence and is repeatedly cited by induced-seismicity studies.
desc_zh: Oklahoma Geological Survey 提供俄克拉荷马地震目录，按年份或时间段下载，并给出事件位置、深度和震级等信息。俄克拉荷马是废水处置诱发地震研究的经典区域，因此该区域目录是后续筛选诱发事件、构建模型和复现文献结果的关键基础。目录本身包含天然与诱发背景，需要结合研究区和时间段判断。
desc_en: The Oklahoma Geological Survey provides downloadable earthquake catalogs with event locations, depths and magnitudes for Oklahoma. Although the catalog is not exclusively anthropogenic, it is a primary regional source for studies of the Oklahoma wastewater-disposal induced seismicity sequence. Users should filter by time, area and supporting literature when constructing induced-event subsets.
evidence: OGS catalog page states downloadable file formats and completeness thresholds for Oklahoma earthquakes.

name: Kansas Earthquake Database
provider: Kansas Geological Survey
theme_raw: Kansas earthquake database
coverage: Kansas, United States
formats: CSV by email request
access: request-download
doi_or_citation: Kansas Geological Survey earthquake database
notes: Download link is sent by email after form submission; still accepted because the public page explicitly offers catalog CSV export. Important for south-central Kansas induced seismicity.
desc_zh: Kansas Earthquake Database 允许用户按条件请求堪萨斯地震目录数据，页面说明通常会在 24-48 小时内通过邮件发送 CSV 下载链接。该目录对 2013 年以后堪萨斯中南部废水注入相关地震活动非常重要。访问不是即时下载，但属于公开请求式数据入口。
desc_en: The Kansas Geological Survey Earthquake Database provides a public form for requesting catalog data, with CSV download links typically sent by email within 24-48 hours. The catalog is a key regional source for south-central Kansas induced seismicity associated with wastewater disposal. Access is not instant, but the public page documents a data export route.
evidence: KGS page states CSV data files are sent by email after a catalog request.

name: Kansas Geoportal earthquakes layer
provider: Kansas Geological Survey / Kansas Geoportal
theme_raw: Kansas earthquakes GIS layer
coverage: Kansas, United States
license: public ArcGIS Hub item; license not explicit
formats: ArcGIS Feature Layer, CSV/GeoJSON/Shapefile via Hub where enabled
access: GIS service, download
doi_or_citation: Kansas Geoportal earthquakes layer
notes: GIS mirror/feature layer for Kansas earthquakes; partly overlaps with KGS database but offers spatial-service access.
desc_zh: Kansas Geoportal 的 Earthquakes 图层提供堪萨斯地震点数据，字段包括震级、深度和发生时间等。它与 KGS 目录存在重叠，但作为 ArcGIS/Hub 图层更方便接入 GIS 工作流。用于人工地震研究时仍需按区域、时间和注入活动线索筛选。
desc_en: The Kansas Geoportal earthquakes layer exposes Kansas earthquake points as a GIS layer, with magnitude, depth and occurrence time attributes. It overlaps the KGS earthquake database but adds spatial-service access for GIS workflows. For anthropogenic-seismicity use, the layer should be filtered against known induced-seismicity regions and operational data.
evidence: Search result and portal metadata identify a KGS-created Kansas earthquake GIS dataset with event attributes.

name: KNMI FDSN earthquake catalog for the Netherlands and surroundings
provider: Royal Netherlands Meteorological Institute (KNMI)
theme_raw: Netherlands earthquake catalog with event type
coverage: Netherlands and near surrounding region
formats: FDSN Event text, NetCDF legacy dataset
access: FDSN API, legacy dataset page
doi_or_citation: KNMI Data Platform dataset aardbevingen_catalogus
time_span: 1900-01-01 to present via FDSN; legacy dataset ended 2025-01-14
notes: Legacy KNMI Data Platform page is deprecated and points users to this FDSN endpoint; catalog distinguishes natural and induced event types, including Groningen gas-field seismicity.
desc_zh: KNMI 荷兰及周边地震目录包含震中、发震时刻、震级、深度和地震类型，类型字段区分天然构造地震与诱发地震。旧的 Data Platform 数据集已在 2024-12-20 标记废弃，并指向 FDSN event 服务作为新访问方式。它是 Groningen 气田诱发地震研究的权威目录入口。
desc_en: The KNMI earthquake catalog for the Netherlands and surrounding region provides epicenter, origin time, magnitude, depth and event type, distinguishing natural tectonic earthquakes from induced earthquakes. The older Data Platform dataset is deprecated and points users to the FDSN event endpoint. This is the authoritative catalog route for Groningen gas-field induced seismicity and other Dutch induced events.
evidence: KNMI dataset page states event type distinguishes natural and induced earthquakes and directs users to the FDSN event query endpoint.

name: Alberta Earthquake Catalogue, version 6.0
provider: Alberta Geological Survey / Alberta Energy Regulator
theme_raw: Alberta earthquake catalogue GIS data
coverage: Alberta, Canada
license: public government data release; license not explicit on page
formats: ZIP, GIS point features
access: direct-download
doi_or_citation: Stern et al. (2018), Alberta Energy Regulator / AGS Digital Dataset 2013-0017
notes: Catalog contains all reviewed Alberta seismic events, not only induced events, but AGS keywords include induced seismicity and the region is important for hydraulic-fracturing and disposal-related seismicity.
desc_zh: Alberta Earthquake Catalogue v6.0 是 Alberta Geological Survey 发布的 GIS 点数据，覆盖 2006 年 9 月至 2017 年阿尔伯塔地震事件。页面提供 ZIP 下载，并说明事件来自多个区域和国家台网、经定位和人工复核。它不是纯诱发目录，但对加拿大西部油气开发相关诱发地震研究非常关键。
desc_en: The Alberta Earthquake Catalogue v6.0 is a GIS point-feature dataset from the Alberta Geological Survey / Alberta Energy Regulator. It covers reviewed earthquake events in Alberta from September 2006 through 2017, located using several regional and national networks. The catalog is not induced-only, but it is a core source for western Canadian hydraulic-fracturing and disposal-related seismicity studies.
evidence: AGS page identifies the item as data, provides a ZIP download, and lists induced seismicity among theme keywords.

name: Seismicity catalog of hydraulic-fracturing-induced earthquakes in the Kiskatinaw area, northeast British Columbia
provider: Zenodo / Roth, Verdecchia, Harrington and Liu
theme_raw: Kiskatinaw hydraulic-fracturing-induced earthquake catalog
coverage: Kiskatinaw area, northeast British Columbia, Canada
formats: CSV
access: direct-download
doi_or_citation: Roth et al. dataset, https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.8074897; related SRL paper DOI 10.1785/0220200086
notes: Zenodo record redirected from earlier concept/version and provides a single CSV earthquake catalog.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集提供加拿大 BC 省东北部 Kiskatinaw 区域水力压裂诱发地震目录。记录说明目录包含 2017-07-01 至 2020-12-31 的 8731 个事件，并以 CSV 文件下载。它是面向单一页岩气区块的高分辨率诱发地震事件目录。
desc_en: This Zenodo record provides a CSV catalog of hydraulic-fracturing-induced earthquakes in the Kiskatinaw area of northeast British Columbia. The catalog covers 8,731 events from 2017-07-01 to 2020-12-31 and is linked to the Roth et al. Seismological Research Letters study. It is a high-resolution regional event catalog for a Montney shale-gas area.
evidence: Zenodo page lists the CSV file, DOI, CC-BY-4.0 license and related SRL publication.
feature_count: 8731 events

name: Earthquake catalogs from induced seismicity case studies in western Texas and northern Oklahoma
provider: University of Bristol / UK National Data Library
theme_raw: Western Texas and northern Oklahoma/Kansas induced seismicity catalogs
coverage: western Texas and northern Oklahoma/Kansas, United States
license: open data portal; license not resolved in v001
formats: data files via portal
access: direct-download via data.gov.uk/National Data Library
doi_or_citation: Verdon and Eisner (2024) associated dataset
notes: Curated from regional earthquake datasets; linked to magnitude forecasting / extreme value methods. Need follow-up to resolve exact file host and license.
desc_zh: 该英国 National Data Library 条目收录西得克萨斯和俄克拉荷马北部/堪萨斯诱发地震案例目录，并包含极值理论震级预测方法结果。页面说明 Texas 数据源来自 TexNet，Oklahoma/Kansas 数据源来自区域目录和文献整理。它适合作为论文复现型案例数据入口，但后续还需解析具体文件、许可证和字段结构。
desc_en: This National Data Library entry contains earthquake catalogs from induced-seismicity case studies in western Texas and northern Oklahoma/Kansas, together with results from magnitude-forecasting methods based on extreme value theory. The catalogs were curated from regional sources such as TexNet and Oklahoma/Kansas datasets. It is useful as a paper-backed case-study release, with file-level license and structure still needing deeper follow-up.
evidence: data.gov.uk summary states the dataset contains earthquake catalogs from induced seismicity cases in western Texas and northern Oklahoma/Kansas.

name: GFZ 2020 Helsinki OTN-2 hydraulic stimulation induced seismicity catalog
provider: GFZ Data Services
theme_raw: Helsinki OTN-2 2020 hydraulic stimulation catalog
coverage: Helsinki, Finland
license: GFZ data license; exact terms to verify from file metadata
formats: catalog files via GFZ Data Services
access: direct-download via DOI landing page
doi_or_citation: Kwiatek, Martínez-Garzón and Karjalainen (2022), GFZ Data Services, https://doi.org/10.5880/GFZ.4.2.2022.001
notes: Catalog built from a 22-geophone high-resolution seismic network during the St1 Deep Heat OTN-2 stimulation.
desc_zh: 该 GFZ 数据发布收录芬兰 Helsinki St1 Deep Heat 项目 OTN-2 井 2020 年水力刺激期间的诱发地震目录。页面说明目录来自围绕项目场地的 22 个地震检波器组成的高分辨率台网。它是增强型地热系统诱发地震的高质量单项目观测数据。
desc_en: This GFZ Data Services publication provides an earthquake catalog for induced seismicity associated with the 2020 hydraulic stimulation campaign at the OTN-2 well near Helsinki, Finland. The catalog was developed from a high-resolution seismic network of 22 geophones around the St1 Deep Heat project site. It is a strong single-project dataset for enhanced geothermal induced seismicity.
evidence: GFZ landing page gives DOI, citation and description of the 2020 hydraulic stimulation induced-seismicity catalog.

name: GFZ 2018 Helsinki EGS stimulation high-resolution seismicity catalog
provider: GFZ Data Services
theme_raw: Helsinki 2018 EGS stimulation catalog
coverage: Helsinki, Finland
license: GFZ data license; exact terms to verify from file metadata
formats: catalog files via GFZ Data Services
access: direct-download via DOI landing page
doi_or_citation: Leonhardt et al. / Kwiatek et al. Helsinki EGS catalog; GFZ Data Services landing page
notes: High-resolution catalog framing the 6.1 km deep EGS stimulation; search result notes 18,160 m3 injected over 49 days.
desc_zh: 该 GFZ 页面描述了 Helsinki 郊区 6.1 km 深增强型地热系统 2018 年水力刺激前后高分辨率地震目录。数据与 St1 Deep Heat 项目相关，记录刺激期间及之后的微震活动。它与 2020 OTN-2 数据互补，可用于比较同一地热项目不同阶段的诱发地震响应。
desc_en: This GFZ Data Services item describes a high-resolution seismicity catalog framing the 2018 stimulation of a 6.1 km deep enhanced geothermal system in suburban Helsinki. It is associated with the St1 Deep Heat project and captures microseismicity around the stimulation period. Together with the 2020 OTN-2 catalog, it supports project-level comparisons of induced seismic response.
evidence: GFZ landing page/search record identifies a high-resolution catalog for the 2018 Helsinki EGS stimulation campaign.

name: Catalog of microseismic events accompanying the 2006 Basel EGS stimulation
provider: MIT DSpace / Basel EGS researchers
theme_raw: Basel 2006-2007 EGS microseismic catalog
coverage: Basel, Switzerland
license: open repository item; license not resolved in v001
formats: repository files / catalog supplement
access: direct-download via repository
doi_or_citation: MIT DSpace item 1721.1/129552
notes: Classic EGS induced-seismicity dataset; accepted from repository record, but file-level fields need deeper extraction in v002.
desc_zh: 该 MIT DSpace 条目收录 2006-2007 年 Basel 增强型地热系统流体刺激期间微震事件位置目录。Basel 是国际上最常用于研究 EGS 诱发地震风险的案例之一。该条目适合作为经典案例数据入口，后续需进一步抽取文件格式、字段和许可证。
desc_en: This MIT DSpace item provides a catalog of microseismic event locations associated with the 2006-2007 Basel enhanced geothermal system stimulation. Basel is a classic EGS induced-seismicity case used in risk-management and forecasting studies. The repository item is accepted as a data-access lead, with file-level structure and license to be extracted in a later pass.
evidence: Repository/search record states the dataset contains a catalog of microseismic event locations accompanying Basel EGS fluid stimulation.

name: Waveforms from Nuclear Explosions (WFNE) Repository
provider: Leidos / Defense Threat Reduction Agency (DTRA)
theme_raw: Nuclear explosion waveforms and metadata
coverage: global
license: request-account repository; license/use terms not resolved in v001
formats: CSS, SAC, waveform data, event metadata
access: account/request access, web selection and download
doi_or_citation: Oancea et al. (2024), Pure and Applied Geophysics, https://doi.org/10.1007/s00024-024-03536-7
notes: Paper describes web access by request; repository itself needs account setup. Accepted as a major open/requestable artificial seismic source dataset.
desc_zh: WFNE 是全球核爆地震波形与元数据资料库，论文说明覆盖 1945-2017 年全球 2157 次地下、大气和水下核爆，并包含 802 次核爆对应的 82000 多条波形。用户可通过网页选择、可视化和下载数据，但需要请求账号。它是人工震源识别和核爆监测研究的重要资料库。
desc_en: The WFNE repository compiles waveform and metadata for nuclear explosions worldwide. The 2024 paper states that it covers all 2,157 underground, atmospheric and underwater nuclear explosions from 1945-2017 and includes more than 82,000 waveforms associated with 802 explosions in CSS and SAC formats. Web access supports selection, visualization and download after account request.
evidence: Springer article describes repository contents, waveform counts, formats and request-based access.
feature_count: 2157 explosion events; 82,000+ waveforms for 802 explosions

name: Lamont-Doherty Borovoye Archive nuclear explosion database
provider: Lamont-Doherty Earth Observatory, Columbia University
theme_raw: Borovoye Archive for underground nuclear tests
coverage: global nuclear test sites
license: public archive pages; license not explicit
formats: HTML tables, PDFs, archive documents
access: direct-download
doi_or_citation: Borovoye Archive nuclear explosion database; Richards, Kim and Ekstrom archive documentation
notes: Historic nuclear-test monitoring archive with worldwide underground nuclear test tables and site-specific documents for Semipalatinsk, Novaya Zemlya, Lop Nor, French Pacific, NTS and others.
desc_zh: Lamont-Doherty 的 Borovoye Archive 页面汇集全球地下核试验相关表格、地图和文档，覆盖 Semipalatinsk、Novaya Zemlya、Lop Nor、法国太平洋试验场、美国 Nevada Test Site 等。它更像历史监测档案和表格集合，而非现代 API 数据库。对于核爆人工震源定位、震级和站点资料追溯很有价值。
desc_en: The Lamont-Doherty Borovoye Archive page aggregates tables, maps and documents for underground nuclear tests at major global test sites, including Semipalatinsk, Novaya Zemlya, Lop Nor, French Pacific test sites and the Nevada Test Site. It is a historical monitoring archive rather than a modern API, but it is valuable for tracing nuclear-explosion source parameters, locations and station records.
evidence: Archive page lists world-wide underground nuclear tests and site-specific downloadable documents/tables.

name: ISC dataset repository: calibrated catalog of earthquakes and nuclear explosions
provider: International Seismological Centre
theme_raw: Calibrated hypocenters and arrival data
coverage: global
license: ISC repository terms; license not resolved in v001
formats: catalog files through ISC dataset repository
access: repository download
doi_or_citation: ISC Dataset Repository submission dsid=52
notes: Mixed earthquake and nuclear explosion catalog; accepted because nuclear explosions are explicit and hypocenters/arrival data are calibrated for source discrimination and relocation work.
desc_zh: ISC 数据集仓库的该条目描述了一个包含地震和核爆的校准震源目录，并配有关联到时数据。说明中强调使用多事件重定位算法得到低偏差震源参数，典型震中不确定度约 1-5 km。它适用于核爆与天然地震识别、定位校准和区域目录标定。
desc_en: This ISC Dataset Repository submission describes a catalog of earthquakes and nuclear explosions with calibrated hypocenters and associated arrival-time data. The record notes that locations were determined using a multiple-event relocation approach adapted for calibrated clusters, with typical epicentral uncertainties of 1-5 km. It is useful for nuclear-explosion discrimination, relocation and catalog calibration.
evidence: ISC repository page states the dataset contains earthquakes and nuclear explosions with calibrated hypocenters and associated arrival times.

name: ANSS Comprehensive Earthquake Catalog (ComCat) artificial event-type access
provider: U.S. Geological Survey / Advanced National Seismic System
theme_raw: ComCat event types: explosion, quarry blast, mining explosion, nuclear explosion, induced or suspected induced
coverage: United States and global contributed events
license: U.S. public domain for USGS data; contributing-network terms may apply
formats: GeoJSON, CSV, KML, QuakeML via API
access: API, web search
doi_or_citation: ANSS Comprehensive Earthquake Catalog documentation
time_span: near-real-time and historical, depending on network and query
notes: General seismic catalog, not artificial-only. Accepted as an access route because ComCat exposes event type filters that can retrieve explosions, quarry blasts, mining explosions, nuclear explosions, induced and suspected induced events when present.
desc_zh: ANSS ComCat 是 USGS/ANSS 维护的综合地震目录，提供网页检索和 API。虽然它不是人工地震专库，但目录包含事件类型字段，可按 explosion、quarry blast、mining explosion、nuclear explosion、induced 或 suspected induced 等类型筛选人工震源。它适合做持续更新的人工事件查询入口，但需要保存具体查询参数以保证可复现。
desc_en: ANSS ComCat is a comprehensive earthquake catalog with web and API access. It is not an anthropogenic-only database, but its event-type field can be used to retrieve artificial or suspected artificial sources such as explosions, quarry blasts, mining explosions, nuclear explosions, induced events and suspected induced events where those classifications exist. Reproducible use requires storing exact API query parameters.
evidence: USGS documentation describes ComCat source parameters and download access; search interface lists induced seismicity project and event-type filtering.

name: NCEDC historic ANSS Composite Catalog search

desc_zh: NCEDC 提供历史 ANSS Composite Catalog 检索，可输出 readable、raw、KML、CSV 等格式。页面提示 ComCat 已是记录目录，但该旧接口对复现早期研究、下载历史格式和比对人工事件分类仍有价值。它不是人工地震专库，需要通过事件类型和区域条件筛选。
desc_en: The NCEDC historic ANSS Composite Catalog search offers exports in readable, raw, KML and CSV formats. The page notes that ComCat is now the catalog of record, but the historic interface remains useful for reproducing older studies and accessing legacy formats. It is not artificial-only and must be filtered by event type, region and time.
evidence: NCEDC page lists export formats and states the ANSS composite catalog time span and ComCat supersession.

name: GSC comprehensive earthquake catalogue for northeastern British Columbia and western Alberta, 2014-2016
provider: Geological Survey of Canada / Natural Resources Canada
theme_raw: NE BC and western Alberta comprehensive earthquake catalogue
coverage: northeastern British Columbia and western Alberta, Canada

desc_zh: 加拿大地质调查局 Open File 8335 对 BC 东北部和阿尔伯塔西部 2014-2016 年地震进行重新定位和编目，研究区与非常规油气开发诱发地震高度相关。页面摘要说明最终目录包含 4916 个合格解，约为 CNSN 基准目录的三倍，并提示完整数据集可从 GeoScan 免费下载。它是加拿大西部诱发地震区域研究的重要补充目录。
desc_en: Geological Survey of Canada Open File 8335 provides a comprehensive 2014-2016 earthquake catalog for northeastern British Columbia and western Alberta, a region strongly associated with unconventional hydrocarbon induced seismicity. The publication page notes 4,916 accepted solutions and says the complete dataset is freely available through GeoScan. It is a valuable regional supplement to operational catalogs.
evidence: Government of Canada record states the final catalog has 4,916 accepted solutions and points to GeoScan for the complete free dataset.
feature_count: 4916 accepted solutions

name: Supplemental material for probabilistic identification of seismicity triggered by oil and gas activities
provider: Zenodo / Langenbruch-related induced seismicity study

coverage: central and eastern United States

access: direct-download
doi_or_citation: Zenodo supplemental material, target DOI https://doi.org/10.0076/FY2022EHPg
notes: Supplemental release for probabilistic identification of seismicity triggered by hydraulic fracturing and saltwater disposal; includes unified catalogs and HF data according to the landing page.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 补充材料服务于一项关于油气活动触发地震概率识别的研究。页面说明作者统一了约 30 个地震目录，并收集美国中东部各州水力压裂数据，用于分析 Oklahoma、Raton、Eagle Ford、Fort Worth、Permian 等区域的 HF 与 SWD 关系。它是连接地震目录和油气作业数据的论文复现型开放资料。
desc_en: This Zenodo supplemental release supports a study on probabilistic identification of seismicity triggered by oil and gas activities. The landing page states that the authors unified about 30 earthquake catalogs and collected hydraulic-fracturing data for central and eastern U.S. states, then evaluated HF and saltwater-disposal relationships in regions such as Oklahoma, Raton, Eagle Ford, Fort Worth and the Permian basin. It is a paper-backed open dataset linking seismicity and operations.
evidence: Zenodo page states dataset type and CC-BY-4.0; description notes unified catalogs and HF data across CEUS cases.
feature_count: about 30 unified earthquake catalogs cited in description

desc_zh: NCEDC 的 Enhanced Geothermal Systems Earthquake Catalog Search 提供增强型地热系统相关地震目录查询，时间覆盖 2003-04-22 至 2016-06-30。界面列出 Berkeley Geysers、Desert Peak、Raft River、Brady's、Newberry 等网络，并可导出多种目录格式。它是美国 EGS/地热诱发地震历史目录的集中查询入口。
desc_en: The NCEDC Enhanced Geothermal Systems Earthquake Catalog Search provides query access to EGS-related earthquake catalogs from 2003-04-22 to 2016-06-30. The interface lists networks such as Berkeley Geysers, Desert Peak, Raft River, Brady's and Newberry and supports catalog exports. It is a useful historical access point for U.S. geothermal and EGS induced-seismicity monitoring.
evidence: NCEDC page states the available date range and input catalogs for EGS networks.

desc_en: This GDR dataset provides Utah FORGE earthquake catalogs covering December 2016 through March 2018 in an Excel file. The record ties the catalogs to the Utah FORGE Phase 2B seismic monitoring report. It serves as baseline and early project seismicity context for later stimulation-related induced microseismicity.
evidence: GDR page lists DOI 10.15121/1452763, public accessibility, CC license and downloadable EQ Catalogs.xlsx.

name: Utah FORGE seismicity associated with the 2019 Well 58-32 stimulation

desc_zh: 该数据集描述 Utah FORGE 2019 年 Well 58-32 刺激期间的微震活动，目录结合 matched-filter 检测和 12 级井中检波器串记录事件。数据说明给出最终合并目录包含 534 个微震事件，震级约为 Mw -2.0 至 -0.1。它是 FORGE 早期水力刺激诱发微震的直接事件目录。
desc_en: This GDR dataset describes seismicity associated with the 2019 stimulation of Utah FORGE Well 58-32. It combines matched-filter detections with events recorded by a 12-level Schlumberger geophone string, producing a final catalog of 534 microseismic events spanning about Mw -2.0 to -0.1. It is a direct event catalog for early FORGE hydraulic stimulation.
evidence: GDR/data.gov metadata states public access, CC-BY license, DOI 10.15121/1872101 and 534 microseismic events.
feature_count: 534 microseismic events

provider: Geothermal Data Repository / University of Utah Seismograph Stations / Geo Energie Suisse

desc_zh: 该 GDR 条目收录 Utah FORGE 2022 年 4 月 Well 16A(78)-32 三个刺激阶段的微震事件目录，由 Geo Energie Suisse 处理。每个表包含源时刻、平面位置、深度和地震矩震级，并提供事件序列动画。它是 FORGE 2022 年主刺激实验的更新版微震目录入口。
desc_en: This GDR entry provides updated microseismic event catalogues for the three April 2022 stimulation stages of Utah FORGE Well 16A(78)-32, derived by Geo Energie Suisse. Each spreadsheet contains source time, xy location, depth and seismic moment magnitude, with an animation of sequence evolution. It is the updated catalog entry for the 2022 FORGE stimulation.
evidence: GDR page states public accessibility, CC license, three microseismic catalogues and linked ISC repository.
feature_count: three stimulation-stage catalogues

access: direct-download

desc_zh: 该 2026 年 GDR 数据集提供 Utah FORGE 2024 年 4 月刺激期间的微震事件位置目录。事件由 PhaseNet 自动拾取 P/S 到时、GaMMA 关联，并用 ADLoc 和 200 次 bootstrap 定位，融合井中检波器与 DAS 数据。数据包包含微震事件 CSV 和相关会议论文。
desc_en: This 2026 GDR dataset provides microseismic event locations for the April 2024 Utah FORGE stimulation. Events were picked with PhaseNet, associated with GaMMA and located with ADLoc using downhole geophones and DAS data, including bootstrap uncertainty estimation. The release includes a CSV microseismic event catalog and an associated conference paper.
evidence: GDR page lists public access, CC license, Microseismic Event Catalog.csv and workflow details.

desc_zh: 该 Mendeley Data 数据集支撑 Lei 等 2017 年关于四川盆地页岩气水力压裂诱发 Mw4.7 级地震的研究。数据包含 M≥1.25 地震目录、双差重定位震源、矩心矩张量和速度模型文件。它是中国页岩气诱发地震研究中少数明确开放的原始/处理数据入口。
desc_en: This Mendeley Data release supports the Lei et al. 2017 Scientific Reports study of Mw4.7 shale-gas hydraulic-fracturing induced earthquakes in the Sichuan Basin, China. It includes an earthquake catalog for M>=1.25 events, relocated hypocenters, centroid moment tensors and velocity model files. It is a rare open data entry point for Chinese shale-gas induced seismicity.
evidence: Mendeley page lists five data-file types including ETAS.eqt, hypoDD.reloc and CMT files tied to Lei et al. 2017.
scale: event catalog and derived seismological products

desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集服务于“利用长宁页岩气田诱发地震进行时移地震层析成像”的研究。文件包括本地台网坐标、用于双差层析的震相目录，以及两套事件重定位结果。数据以 CC-BY-4.0 开放，适合进一步研究页岩气开发区诱发地震的精细结构和时空演化。
desc_en: This Zenodo release supports time-lapse seismic tomography using induced seismicity in the Changning shale gas field of the southern Sichuan Basin. It includes local station coordinates, a seismic phase catalog for double-difference tomography and two earthquake relocation files. The CC-BY-4.0 release is useful for studying fine structure and spatiotemporal evolution in a shale-gas induced-seismicity setting.
evidence: Zenodo page lists station.dat, catalog.dat, relocation files and CC-BY-4.0 license.
feature_count: 4 files

desc_zh: 该 Mendeley Data 数据集收录 2017 年 Pohang 地震的 1124 个余震，记录来自韩国地质资源研究院 KIGAM 的 41 个台站。Pohang 地震与增强型地热系统注入活动之间的因果关系是人工诱发/触发地震研究的重点案例，尽管机制和术语仍有争议。该数据可作为 Pohang 序列后续震源和余震分析入口。
desc_en: This Mendeley Data release contains 1,124 aftershocks of the 2017 Pohang earthquake recorded by 41 Korea Institute of Geoscience and Mineral Resources stations. The Pohang sequence is a major EGS-related induced or triggered seismicity case, although its causal classification remains debated in the literature. The dataset provides a direct aftershock-data entry point for sequence analysis.
evidence: Mendeley page gives DOI 10.17632/f22zcmy4pb.1 and states 1124 aftershocks recorded by 41 KIGAM stations.
feature_count: 1124 aftershocks

desc_en: This ISC Dataset Repository entry provides the Raton Basin 2018 nodal array catalog, with about 10,000 earthquakes identified from 96 three-component nodal stations. The southern Raton Basin is a key wastewater-injection induced seismicity setting. Events were picked with a machine-learning phase picker and located/relocated, with a TXT download under CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0.
evidence: ISC page lists DOI, license, about 10000 events, 96 stations and downloadable raton_bymag.txt.
feature_count: about 10000 earthquakes

provider: U.S. Geological Survey

desc_zh: 该 USGS 数据发布提供 Paradox Valley 1991-2012 年诱发地震分析所用三维数值网格和属性。网格服务于有限元/有限体积流固耦合和孔弹性分析，空间范围约 25 km 见方、深度至 15 km。它不是事件目录，但直接面向长期深井盐水注入诱发地震机理建模。
desc_en: This USGS data release provides a three-dimensional numerical grid used for finite-element and finite-volume analysis of induced seismicity at Paradox Valley, Colorado, during the 1991-2012 brine-injection period. The grid spans roughly 25 km horizontally and extends to 15 km depth. It is not an event catalog, but it is a direct modeling dataset for a classic long-term injection-induced seismicity project.
evidence: USGS page states DOI 10.5066/P943TFT7, CC0 rights and grid purpose for induced seismicity analysis.
feature_count: 245 x 241 x 31 grid elements described

provider: Zenodo / Xiong et al. catalog compilation

coverage: Ohio, Oklahoma and West Texas, United States
formats: TXT, CSV
access: direct-download
doi_or_citation: Zenodo dataset, https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20050620; Xiong et al. (2023), Nature Communications
notes: Repository also contains a Southern California tectonic catalog; accepted for its induced subsets HamiltonOH, RyserOH, Guthrie and West_TX.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集汇编用于检验震级依赖性的多个目录，其中包括 Ohio Harrison County 的 Hamilton/Ryser 水力压裂诱发微震、Oklahoma Guthrie 废水处置相关地震，以及 West Texas Delaware Basin 油气活动相关诱发地震目录。文件以 TXT/CSV 提供，许可证为 CC-BY-4.0。虽然同仓库还包含一个天然构造目录，本条目按人工诱发子集收录。
desc_en: This Zenodo release compiles catalogs for testing magnitude dependence and includes several induced-seismicity subsets: Hamilton and Ryser hydraulic-fracturing catalogs from Harrison County, Ohio, the Guthrie wastewater-disposal cluster in Oklahoma, and a West Texas Delaware Basin catalog related to wastewater disposal and hydrocarbon production. Files are provided as TXT/CSV under CC-BY-4.0. The repository also contains a tectonic Southern California catalog, so this row refers to the induced subsets.
evidence: Zenodo page lists HamiltonOH, RyserOH, Guthrie and West_TX induced catalog descriptions, files and CC-BY-4.0 license.
feature_count: 4 induced catalog files plus one non-target catalog

name: Source Physics Experiments 5 and 6 data release report, Nevada National Security Site
provider: OSTI / NNSS / MSTS / national laboratory collaborators
theme_raw: SPE-5 and SPE-6 near-field, far-field and large-N data release
coverage: Nevada National Security Site, United States
license: U.S. government technical report; data access terms in report
formats: technical report, seismic/acoustic waveform datasets described
access: data release documentation; data available to analysts
doi_or_citation: Townsend et al. (2019), https://doi.org/10.2172/1525892
notes: Controlled chemical explosion data including a dense temporary array of 996 geophones for both shots.
desc_zh: SPE-5 和 SPE-6 是 NNSS Source Physics Experiment 中两次受控化学爆炸，分别于 2016-04-26 和 2016-10-12 实施。OSTI 页面说明两次爆炸均由近场和远场多类地震/声学传感器记录，并由 996 个检波器组成的大 N 临时台阵记录。该资料对人工爆炸震源、近远场波场和核爆监测算法验证很有价值。
desc_en: SPE-5 and SPE-6 were controlled chemical explosions at the Nevada National Security Site on 2016-04-26 and 2016-10-12. The OSTI record describes extensive near-field and far-field instrumentation and a temporary large-N array of 996 geophones. These releases are valuable for explosion source physics, near/far-field wave propagation and nuclear-explosion monitoring algorithm validation.
source_type: government technical report and data-release documentation
evidence: OSTI page gives shot dates, yields, instrumentation and states data release to outside analysts/organizations.
feature_count: two chemical explosion experiments; 996-geophone temporary array

name: FDSN 8N Multi-Modal DAG-4 Dataset
provider: FDSN / NSF SAGE IRIS-DMC / Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory / national laboratory collaborators
theme_canonical: Controlled chemical-explosion multimodal seismic, infrasound and electromagnetic waveform-event dataset
theme_raw: Multi-Modal DAG-4 Dataset (MM-DAG4), Source Physics Experiment Phase II Dry Alluvium Geology
coverage: Nevada National Security Site and regional stations within 255 km of the DAG-4 buried chemical explosion, Nevada, USA
formats: NNSA KB Core CSS .w waveform files, wfdisc header table, CSS metadata tables, FDSN network metadata, IRIS/SAGE assembled dataset metadata, event catalog
access: FDSN network metadata page and NSF SAGE/IRIS MDA assembled dataset page 23-001; data access via IRIS/SAGE assembled dataset request workflow rather than ordinary fedcatalog time-series services
doi_or_citation: FDSN network DOI 10.7914/51nb-ar79; Rodd, R.L., Brogan, R.A., Carmichael, J.D., Price, A.C. and Young, C.J. (2023). A Multimodal Event Catalog and Waveform Data Set That Supports Explosion Monitoring from Nevada, U.S.A. Bulletin of the Seismological Society of America, 113(4), doi:10.1785/0120220218; OSTI record https://www.osti.gov/biblio/1983737; IRIS/SAGE assembled dataset report 23-001
notes: Refreshed in v035 after following the Source Physics Experiment / DAG-4 evidence chain. This row represents the same dataset discussed by Rodd et al. (2023) and hosted as NSF SAGE/IRIS MDA assembled dataset 23-001, not a new duplicate row. The ordinary fedcatalog query for network 8N is not the correct access path for the assembled CSS data; use the IRIS/SAGE MDA assembled dataset page and request workflow.
desc_zh: 该数据集是 Source Physics Experiment Phase II Dry Alluvium Geology 中 DAG-4 10 吨级地下化学爆破的多模态观测与人工事件目录。FDSN 8N 页面说明，数据覆盖 2019 年 6 月 15-30 日、爆点 255 km 范围内的地震、次声和电磁观测，并包含由分析员审查波形建立的 485 个 seismic、seismo-acoustic 和 infrasound-only 事件目录。OSTI/BSSA 论文页进一步说明数据来自 29 个 seismic/infrasound 传感器和 2 个磁力仪台站，波形以 NNSA KB Core CSS .w 格式和 wfdisc 表发布；v035 确认其 IRIS/SAGE assembled dataset 编号为 23-001，访问路径应走 MDA/assembled data，而不是普通 fedcatalog 时间序列接口。
desc_en: This dataset is the multimodal observation and analyst-built event-catalog package for the 10-ton DAG-4 buried chemical explosion in Source Physics Experiment Phase II Dry Alluvium Geology. The FDSN 8N page states that the data cover 2019-06-15 to 2019-06-30 within 255 km of the DAG-4 shot and include a 485-event catalog of seismic, seismoacoustic and infrasound-only events built by reviewing the waveforms. The OSTI/BSSA article page further states that the release includes waveforms from 29 seismic/infrasound sensors and two magnetometer stations, delivered as NNSA KB Core CSS .w files with a wfdisc table; v035 confirmed the IRIS/SAGE assembled dataset report number 23-001, so the appropriate access route is the MDA/assembled-data workflow rather than a normal fedcatalog time-series query.
openness: public network metadata and service access
source_type: FDSN/NSF SAGE assembled controlled chemical-explosion multimodal waveform and event-catalog dataset
evidence: FDSN network 8N page states network name Multi-Modal DAG-4 Dataset, code 8N, start/end year 2019, LLNL operator, DOI 10.7914/51nb-ar79, two-week interval June 15-30 2019, 10-ton buried chemical explosion DAG-4, 485-event analyst-built catalog, NNSA KB Core CSS .w waveform format and corresponding metadata tables. NSF SAGE MDA page 23-001 identifies report number 23-001, name Multi-Modal DAG-4 Dataset, nickname MM-DAG4, format CSS, type Other, seismic network 8N_2019 and start/end year 2019. OSTI record 1983737 / BSSA article metadata states the release includes waveforms from 29 seismic/infrasound sensors and two magnetometer stations and a wfdisc table. Local access probe confirmed the MDA page and assembled-data request page return HTTP 200, while ordinary fedcatalog query for 8N returned 404, supporting the assembled-data access note.
scale: regional multimodal controlled underground chemical-explosion monitoring dataset
feature_count: 485 analyst-built seismic, seismoacoustic and infrasound-only events; waveforms from 29 seismic/infrasound sensors and two magnetometer stations; two-week 2019 collection interval
file_size: not enumerated on inspected FDSN/MDA pages; data delivered as assembled CSS waveform package through NSF SAGE/IRIS workflow

name: EPOS TCS Anthropogenic Hazards EPISODES Platform
provider: EPOS Thematic Core Service Anthropogenic Hazards / Institute of Geophysics, Polish Academy of Sciences / ACC Cyfronet AGH
theme_raw: EPISODES Platform
coverage: global and Europe-focused cases
license: episode-specific; platform provides open data where access is open
formats: episode bundles, catalogs, waveforms, technological data, XML, SEED, MAT, CSV and platform workspaces
access: web platform, open and restricted episode access
doi_or_citation: Lasocki et al. (2022), Annals of Geophysics, doi:10.4401/ag-8743; EPOS TCS AH EPISODES Platform
time_span: platform active; episodes added from 2015 through 2025 timeline
notes: Platform-level row for EPOS/IS-EPOS induced-seismicity episodes. Individual open episodes should still be cataloged separately when metadata and access are clear.
desc_zh: EPOS TCS Anthropogenic Hazards 的 EPISODES Platform 是人工诱发地震和相关地质灾害的虚拟实验室，数据以 episode 组织，把地震、技术作业和地球物理资料关联到工业诱因。TCS AH 页面说明 episode 覆盖八类工业活动，并通过平台提供开放数据、软件和工作空间。该行作为总入口，具体开放 episode 仍应按项目单独收录。
desc_en: The EPOS TCS Anthropogenic Hazards EPISODES Platform is a virtual laboratory for induced seismicity and related anthropogenic hazards. Its data are organized as episodes that connect seismic, technological and other geophysical data to an industrial cause, spanning multiple industrial activities. This row records the platform-level access route; individual open episodes should be cataloged separately when their metadata and download route are clear.
openness: platform with open and restricted resources
evidence: TCS AH page states EPISODES provides open access to accumulated resources and episodes related to anthropogenic seismicity induced by industrial activities.
feature_count: 37 episodes reported in 2021 paper; timeline lists continuing additions through 2025

desc_zh: SONG TRANH episode 记录越南中部 Song Tranh 2 水库蓄水后出现的水库诱发地震活动。IG PAS 数据门户说明该水库库容约 7.4 亿立方米，水位在 140-175 m 之间，原本被认为无震的区域在 2011 年水库蓄水后开始出现地震。数据通过 EPISODES Platform 访问，格式标注为 XML、SEED 和 MAT。
desc_en: The SONG TRANH episode documents reservoir-triggered seismicity associated with the Song Tranh 2 hydropower reservoir in central Vietnam. The IG PAS metadata describe a 740 million cubic metre reservoir with water levels between 140 and 175 m, where seismic activity began in 2011 after impoundment in an area previously considered aseismic. Data access is through the EPISODES Platform with XML, SEED and MAT formats listed.
evidence: IG PAS Data Portal page lists access constraint Open, DOI, license, resource download link and data formats XML/SEED/MAT.

desc_zh: 该 GDR 条目指向 The Geysers 地热场 2012-2013 年 GEISER 项目的宽频地震数据。页面说明包含两类数据：2012 年 7 月至 2013 年 7 月连续波形，以及带有地震信息和 P/S 到时的处理后目录。它是研究地热生产/注入相关诱发地震和微震监测算法的具体数据入口。
desc_en: This GDR entry points to GEISER broadband seismic data for The Geysers geothermal field from July 2012 to July 2013. The page states that two datasets are available: continuous waveform data and a processed catalog with earthquake information and P- and S-wave phase arrivals. It is a concrete data entry for geothermal induced seismicity and microseismic monitoring studies at The Geysers.
evidence: GDR page states public accessibility, CC license and two datasets: continuous waveforms plus processed catalog with phase arrivals.
feature_count: two available datasets

desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集包含冰岛 Hellisheiði 地热场 Húsmúli 回注区 2015-2020 年的注入数据和地震目录。文件包括 Húsmúli 液压数据、SIL 地震目录、井坐标和 README，许可证为 CC-BY-4.0。它非常适合研究回注压力/流量与诱发地震活动之间的时间关系。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset contains injection data and a seismic catalog for the Húsmúli reinjection area of the Hellisheiði geothermal field in Iceland from 2015 to 2020. Files include hydraulic data, the SIL seismic catalog, well coordinates and a README under CC-BY-4.0. It is well suited for studying temporal relationships between reinjection operations and induced seismicity.
evidence: Zenodo page lists the hydraulic CSV, SIL catalogue CSV, well coordinates, DOI and CC-BY-4.0 license.
feature_count: 4 files

desc_zh: COSEISMIQ/Hengill 数据集来自冰岛 Hengill 地热区的临时密集地震监测，Scientific Data 论文说明释放了原始连续波形和地震目录。该区域包含冰岛两个大型地热电站，地震活动既有天然成分也有生产/注入相关成分。数据主要通过 EIDA/FDSN 的 2C 网络及论文给出的数据路径访问。
desc_en: The COSEISMIQ/Hengill dataset comes from dense temporary seismic monitoring in the Hengill geothermal area of Iceland. The Scientific Data paper states that raw continuous seismic waveforms and seismicity catalogues were released, in a region hosting two major geothermal power plants where both natural and production/injection-related seismicity occur. FDSN network 2C and the article data routes provide the main access path.
openness: open article and public waveform services
evidence: Scientific Data record states release of raw continuous waveforms and seismicity catalogues; FDSN 2C metadata describes COSEISMIQ induced-seismicity monitoring.

name: Machine Learning Ready Induced Seismicity Data
provider: Zenodo / Castiglione et al.
theme_raw: Temporal induced seismicity and pressure datasets
coverage: Decatur Illinois, Kansas, Cushing Oklahoma and subregions
formats: TGZ, CSV time series
access: direct-download
doi_or_citation: Castiglione et al. (2022), https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.6957214
notes: Derived ML-ready temporal datasets from previously published induced seismicity and pressure data; useful for forecasting benchmarks rather than raw seismological analysis.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集把已发表诱发地震资料处理成机器学习可用的时间序列，包含累计地震事件数和对应的地下流体注入压力。页面说明数据覆盖 Decatur Illinois、Kansas 和 Cushing Oklahoma 等区域，地震文件含 epoch、经纬度、深度、平面坐标和震级字段。它适合作为诱发地震预测算法的轻量级基准数据。
desc_en: This Zenodo release converts previously published induced seismicity and pressure data into machine-learning-ready temporal datasets. It includes cumulative seismicity and injection-pressure time series for regions such as Decatur, Kansas and Cushing, Oklahoma, with event files carrying epoch, latitude, longitude, depth, easting, northing and magnitude fields. It is best used as a forecasting benchmark rather than a raw seismological archive.
evidence: Zenodo page lists dataset type, TGZ file, induced seismicity forecasting keywords, CC-BY-4.0 license and field descriptions.
feature_count: Decatur, Kansas and Cushing datasets with subregions

desc_en: This Zenodo release provides multiple association-method earthquake catalogs for the Oklahoma LASSO dense-array dataset, including GaMMA, PhaseLink, GENIE, REAL catalogs and original detected phase picks. The LASSO experiment targeted likely injection-induced seismicity in an active wastewater-injection region. The release is about 2.3 GB and is distributed under CC-BY-4.0.

notes: Waveform complement to the v003 Zenodo LASSO derived catalogs; FDSN page states the experiment targeted likely-induced seismicity in an active wastewater injection region.
desc_zh: FDSN 2A 网络是 Oklahoma LASSO 大 N 台阵的原始波形数据入口，2016 年春季在 Grant County 部署约 1829 个垂直分量节点台站，持续约 4 周。FDSN 页面明确说明该被动源实验瞄准活跃废水注入区中的可能诱发地震序列。它与 Zenodo 的处理后目录互补，适合原始波形重处理和新算法测试。
desc_en: FDSN network 2A is the waveform access route for the Oklahoma LASSO large-N array. The 2016 deployment used about 1,829 vertical-component nodal sensors in Grant County for roughly four weeks, targeting likely induced seismicity in an active wastewater-injection region. It complements the derived LASSO catalogs and is useful for waveform reprocessing and algorithm development.

evidence: FDSN page states network code 2A_2016, LASSO deployment description and target likely-induced seismicity in active wastewater injection region.

desc_zh: RISBRA/BDSDR 是巴西水库诱发地震空间数据库和网页浏览器，NHESS 论文说明其用于汇集水库诱发地震研究所需的水库、坝高、库容、地质、地震事件等信息。文章将巴西已知 RTS 案例更新到 30 个，并提供可下载表格。它是水库诱发地震区域数据库的代表性开放线索。
desc_en: RISBRA/BDSDR is a spatial database and web viewer for reservoir-triggered seismicity in Brazil. The NHESS article describes a database designed to assemble reservoir, dam, geological, geophysical and seismic-event information for RTS studies, updating the Brazilian RTS list to 30 cases. Downloadable article tables and the described web viewer make it a useful regional reservoir-triggered seismicity database.

feature_count: 30 Brazilian RTS cases; 348 reservoirs compared

name: LGCD regional seismicity and ground motion associating underground hard rock mining

coverage: Legnica-Glogow Copper District, southwestern Poland

desc_zh: LGCD episode 记录波兰西南部 Legnica-Glogow Copper District 地下铜矿开采诱发的区域地震与地面运动资料。IG PAS 页面说明矿山采用房柱式开采，深度约 0.6-1.3 km，数据只包含地震台网记录到的事件。该 episode 提供 DOI、开放访问约束、CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0 许可和 EPISODES 平台下载入口。
desc_en: The LGCD episode documents regional seismicity and ground motion induced by underground copper-ore exploitation in the Legnica-Glogow Copper District of southwestern Poland. The IG PAS page states that the mines use room-and-pillar mining at about 0.6-1.3 km depth and that the episode includes only events recorded within the seismic network. It provides a DOI, open access constraint, CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0 license and EPISODES download access.

feature_count: events recorded inside the local seismic network

The IG PAS metadata describe a shallow reservoir of about 234.5 million cubic metres, with typical water-column depths of 20-50 m, where seismic activity began in 2011. It is a core raw dataset for later Brady geothermal-field DAS seismic monitoring and shutdown-triggered seismicity studies.

desc_en: This Science Data Bank dataset provides raw waveform datasets and code for the MCU-Quake real-time seismic-signal discrimination study. The page metadata states that it includes localized UUSS data for ambient noise, quarry blasts and natural earthquakes, plus a STEAD subset and Russia-Ukraine conflict case-study waveforms. desc_en: PNW-ML is an AI-ready seismic waveform dataset curated by the Pacific Northwest Seismic Network and University of Washington collaborators for machine-learning event classification. The repository states that datasets are provided as HDF5 waveforms and CSV metadata in SeisBench format, with access through Google Drive, UW-ESS and SeisBench. It explicitly includes explosions, sonic booms, thunder and surface events in addition to earthquakes, making it a useful benchmark for anthropogenic and non-tectonic source discrimination.

file_size: 62.7 GB ComCat waveform file, 3.9 GB exotic waveform file, 18 GB noise waveform file, plus smaller subsets

desc_en: The NAM EPOS Groningen dataset is a large KNMI-published seismic archive from the Groningen gas-field area, collected by NAM downhole geophone arrays and flexible surface networks between 2013 and 2018. The KNMI landing page lists a CC-BY-4.0 license and SEG-Y, SEG-D and MIRF5 formats, while EPOS-NL describes roughly 50 TB of raw data compressed to about 25 TB and downloadable in portions. It is not just an event catalog, but a primary waveform and survey archive for gas-production induced seismicity and monitoring studies.
source_type: national data platform and EPOS infrastructure dataset
evidence: EPOS-NL describes the dataset as openly published by KNMI, with surface stations and downhole arrays in the Groningen gas-field area. KNMI Data Platform metadata lists NAM EPOS datasets, CC-BY-4.0 license, SEG-Y/SEG-D/MIRF5 formats, 2013-10-09 to 2018-12-23 temporal coverage and dataset identifier urn:xkdc:ds:nl.knmi::nam_epos_dataset/1.0/; the KNMI page returns HTTP 403 to lychee, so the lychee-verified row URL uses the EPOS-NL access notice.

file_size: about 50 TB raw; about 25 TB compressed

doi_or_citation: Hillers et al. (2021), https://doi.org/10.5880/GIPP.201925.1
time_span: 2020 EGS stimulation period in the Helsinki capital area, including the May 2020 Otaniemi stimulation response
notes: This row complements existing Helsinki/Otaniemi catalog rows by representing a waveform deployment rather than an event catalog. GFZ page metadata states that the dataset is not available for automated download and requires a request form for data transfer.
desc_zh: 该 GFZ/GIPP 数据集记录了 Espoo/Helsinki Otaniemi 地区 2020 年增强型地热系统刺激期间的 70 台三分量传感器部署。页面关键词和元数据表明数据为 MiniSEED 地震波形，服务于约 6 km 深 EGS 刺激诱发地震响应监测。数据采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，但 GFZ 页面说明不能自动下载，需要通过请求表单完成数据传输。
desc_en: This GFZ/GIPP dataset documents a 70 three-component sensor deployment used to monitor the 2020 enhanced-geothermal-system stimulation in the Otaniemi district of Espoo/Helsinki. The landing page metadata identifies MiniSEED seismic waveform data for the monitoring response to a roughly 6 km deep EGS stimulation. The dataset is licensed CC BY 4.0, but GFZ states that it is transferred through a request form rather than automated download.
evidence: GFZ/GIPP landing page lists DOI 10.5880/GIPP.201925.1, CC BY 4.0 rights, title naming a 70 three-component sensor deployment for the 2020 Espoo/Helsinki EGS stimulation, MiniSEED waveform-data keywords and a request-form transfer notice.
feature_count: 70 three-component sensors
file_size: not posted for automated download; transferred by request

name: University of Helsinki 10-20 Hz template matching catalogue for the St1 EGS project
provider: Institute of Seismology, University of Helsinki / Fairdata IDA
theme_raw: Template-matching event catalogue for the St1 Enhanced Geothermal System project in Espoo/Otaniemi
coverage: Otaniemi, Espoo/Helsinki, southern Finland
formats: Fairdata IDA dataset files, event-catalogue data and license.md
access: Fairdata/Etsin landing page and Research.fi/resodate metadata; no-login access indicated in structured metadata
doi_or_citation: Institute of Seismology, University of Helsinki dataset DOI https://doi.org/10.23729/cfa666ed-29f3-4017-a1b6-0e0418e7fa2e
notes: Accepted as an induced-seismicity event-catalog dataset because the University of Helsinki research portal and related publication explicitly tie it to the St1 EGS project and thousands of small induced earthquakes in Otaniemi. Resodate structured metadata resolves the DOI to CC-BY-4.0 and no-login access.
desc_zh: 该数据集是芬兰赫尔辛基大学地震研究所发布的 St1 Enhanced Geothermal System 项目模板匹配事件目录，覆盖 Espoo/Otaniemi 2018 年 6 月至 2022 年 12 月。研究门户和相关文章说明 Otaniemi 深部地热刺激产生了大量小震，目录用于把监测阈值推进到零级以下并识别诱发事件。DOI 结构化元数据给出 CC BY 4.0 许可和无需登录的访问条件。
desc_en: This dataset is a template-matching event catalogue from the Institute of Seismology, University of Helsinki for the St1 Enhanced Geothermal System project in Espoo/Otaniemi, covering June 2018 through December 2022. The research portal and associated publication link it to thousands of small induced earthquakes from the Otaniemi deep geothermal stimulations and sub-zero magnitude monitoring. Structured DOI metadata reports CC-BY-4.0 licensing and no-login access.
openness: Fairdata/IDA DOI record under CC-BY-4.0 with no-login access metadata
evidence: University of Helsinki Research Portal lists the dataset title, Fairdata publisher, temporal coverage and DOI. Resodate/Research.fi structured metadata for the DOI lists license https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ and conditionsOfAccess no_login.
feature_count: template-matching catalogue for 2018-2022 Otaniemi EGS monitoring

name: ScienceDB mainland China seismic event classification waveform dataset
provider: Science Data Bank / China Digital Seismograph Network data contributors / ResWaveQuake authors
theme_raw: Mainland China earthquake, explosion and collapse/subsidence waveform classification dataset
coverage: Mainland China and adjacent regions
formats: HDF5 waveform files derived from original MiniSEED data
access: Science Data Bank repository record with DOI metadata
doi_or_citation: Xiao, Chen and Fu (2025/2026), Science Data Bank DOI https://doi.org/10.57760/sciencedb.34064; related JGR Solid Earth article DOI https://doi.org/10.1029/2025JB032752
notes: Accepted as an anthropogenic-event discrimination benchmark rather than a pure induced-earthquake catalog. ScienceDB structured metadata states that the dataset includes natural earthquakes, explosions and collapses/subsidences, and is stored as HDF5 files converted from MiniSEED waveforms.
desc_zh: 该 Science Data Bank 数据集面向中国大陆地震事件分类与机器学习研究，基于中国数字地震台网波形数据构建。结构化元数据说明它覆盖 2013 年 1 月至 2024 年 5 月，包含天然地震、爆破和塌陷/沉陷三类事件，约 2,870 个事件和约 100,000 条波形记录。数据由原始 MiniSEED 转换为 HDF5，适合作为人工地震/爆破/塌陷信号识别的开放基准。
desc_en: This Science Data Bank dataset supports seismic-event classification and machine-learning research in mainland China using China Digital Seismograph Network waveform data. Structured metadata states that it spans January 2013 to May 2024 and includes natural earthquakes, explosions and collapses/subsidences, with 2,870 events and roughly 100,000 waveform traces. The original MiniSEED data are converted to HDF5, making it useful as an open benchmark for anthropogenic explosion and collapse-source discrimination.
openness: Science Data Bank public dataset under CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0
source_type: ScienceDB DOI data repository and peer-reviewed article companion
evidence: ScienceDB/Croissant JSON-LD for DOI 10.57760/sciencedb.34064 lists PUBLIC access, CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0 license, Science Data Bank publisher, HDF5 waveform format, 2013-01 to 2024-05 coverage, and classes for natural earthquakes, explosions and collapses/subsidences. The JGR Solid Earth data availability statement points to the same ScienceDB DOI.
feature_count: 2,870 seismic events and approximately 100,000 waveform traces; 1,158 earthquakes, 972 explosions and 740 collapses/subsidences

name: DiTing Dataset 2.0 - China Seismograph Network multifunctional AI training dataset
provider: National Earthquake Science Data Center / China Earthquake Networks Center / Institute of Geophysics, China Earthquake Administration
theme_raw: China Seismograph Network AI training dataset with industrial non-natural seismic/noise events and event-type labels
coverage: Mainland China and adjacent regions, 15-50 N and 65-140 E
license: National Earthquake Science Data Center data-sharing terms; required dataset citation and public-results feedback
formats: HDF5 waveform files, JSON metadata files and Data_Read_Example.ipynb
access: National Earthquake Science Data Center landing page; offline acquisition/order workflow
doi_or_citation: Zhao, Xiao, Chen, Zhang et al. (2023), DOI 10.12080/nedc.11.ds.2023.0002; CSTR 12166.11.ds.2023.0002; literature also cites 10.11998/IESDC.SEIS.D03MOD20230002
time_span: 2020-03 to 2023-02 for event waveforms; 2021-06 to 2023-02 for noise/non-natural signal review set
notes: Accepted as a high-value anthropogenic-event benchmark lead because the official NEDC page states that DiTing 2.0 includes an independent noise dataset whose reviewed signal types include industrial activity and other non-natural seismic events, and the metadata includes an evtype event-type field. Access is offline/order-based rather than direct download.
desc_zh: DiTing 2.0 是国家地震科学数据中心发布的中国地震台网多功能大型人工智能训练数据集，覆盖中国大陆及邻区 2020 年 3 月至 2023 年 2 月。官方页面说明主数据包含 264,298 个天然地震事件的 1,089,920 条三分量波形，并额外制作了约 13 万条噪声/干扰信号数据，其中包括工业活动等非天然地震事件；元数据中包含 evtype 事件类型字段。数据以 HDF5 波形和同名 JSON 元数据提供，需通过离线获取/订单流程访问，并按中心要求引用数据和反馈公开成果。
desc_en: DiTing Dataset 2.0 is a large multifunctional AI training dataset from the National Earthquake Science Data Center and China Seismograph Network, covering mainland China and adjacent regions from March 2020 to February 2023. The official page states that the main event-waveform component contains 264,298 natural earthquakes and 1,089,920 three-component waveforms, and that a separate roughly 130,000-sample noise/interference set includes industrial activity and other non-natural seismic events; metadata include an evtype event-type field. Waveforms are stored as HDF5 with matching JSON metadata, with access through an offline/order workflow and required data citation and public-results feedback.
openness: institutional data-sharing record with public landing page, DOI/CSTR citation and offline acquisition workflow
evidence: Official NEDC page lists title, 130.0 GB and 1,235,295 records, offline acquisition, DOI 10.12080/nedc.11.ds.2023.0002, CSTR 12166.11.ds.2023.0002, 2020.03-2023.02 temporal coverage, HDF5 waveform and JSON metadata formats, evtype event-type field, and an independent noise dataset containing industrial activity and other non-natural seismic events. GJI and EGU references cite DiTing 2.0 for earthquake, explosion and collapse discrimination.
feature_count: 1,235,295 records reported; 264,298 natural earthquake events and 1,089,920 three-component event waveforms, plus about 130,000 reviewed noise/non-natural signal samples

name: Rittershoffen ECOGI geothermal development induced-seismicity reference catalogue
provider: ÉS-Géothermie / CDGP-EOST / Springer Nature Geothermal Energy
theme_raw: Reference microseismic catalogue during ECOGI Rittershoffen geothermal field development
coverage: Rittershoffen geothermal field, Upper Rhine Graben, Alsace, France
formats: TXT tabular event catalogue; CDGP metadata also lists CSV
access: Springer Nature article supplementary TXT download and CDGP catalogue metadata
doi_or_citation: Maurer et al. (2020), https://doi.org/10.1186/s40517-020-0155-2; CDGP record RITD-Catalogue
notes: Accepted as a directly downloadable induced-seismicity event catalogue. The article states that the reference catalogue is included as Additional file 1; CDGP metadata describes the same ECOGI Rittershoffen catalogue and lists 1348 events recorded during drilling, thermal stimulation, hydraulic stimulation and GRT-2 drilling.
desc_zh: 该数据集是法国 Alsace Rittershoffen ECOGI 地热田开发阶段的诱发微地震参考目录，覆盖 GRT-1 钻井、热刺激、化学/水力刺激以及 GRT-2 钻井等阶段。Springer 论文附加文件提供可直接下载的 TXT 事件表，CDGP 元数据说明目录含 1348 个事件，时间范围为 2012-11-29 至 2014-05-26。字段包括发震时刻、Lambert II 坐标、深度、局地震级、不确定性轴和记录阶段，可用于地热开发诱发地震时空演化分析。
desc_en: This dataset is the reference induced-microseismicity catalogue for the ECOGI geothermal-field development phase at Rittershoffen, Alsace, France, covering GRT-1 drilling, thermal stimulation, chemical/hydraulic stimulation and GRT-2 drilling periods. The Springer article provides the catalogue as a directly downloadable TXT supplementary file, while CDGP metadata describes the same catalogue with 1,348 events from 2012-11-29 to 2014-05-26. Fields include origin time, Lambert II coordinates, depth, local magnitude, uncertainty axes and recorded operation period, supporting analysis of geothermal induced-seismicity evolution.
source_type: peer-reviewed article supplementary dataset and CDGP metadata record
evidence: Springer article lines state the reference seismic catalogue is included as Additional file 1 and describe the 1348-earthquake catalogue fields. Rights and permissions state CC-BY-4.0. CDGP RITD-Catalogue metadata lists 1348 events, CSV format, confidentiality level public, 2012-11-29 to 2014-05-26 coverage, Rittershoffen/ECOGI location and operational phases.
feature_count: 1348 earthquakes

name: TOPASE temporary passive seismic waveforms at Rittershoffen geothermal field
provider: GFZ Data Services / Geophysical Instrument Pool Potsdam / KIT-AGW-Geothermal / CDGP-EOST
theme_raw: Temporary passive seismic network waveform data for Rittershoffen ECOGI development
coverage: Rittershoffen geothermal field, Upper Rhine Graben, Alsace, France
formats: MiniSEED waveform data and GFZ/GIPP metadata
access: GFZ/GIPP DOI landing page with request form to contact authors; CDGP waveform metadata points to the same TOPASE dataset
doi_or_citation: Gaucher, Maurer and Grunberg (2019), https://doi.org/10.5880/GIPP.201305.1
notes: Accepted as the waveform counterpart to the Rittershoffen catalogue. GFZ states the dataset is not available for public download and requires filling in a form to contact the authors, so access is request-based even though the DOI metadata and license are open.
desc_zh: TOPASE 数据集是 Rittershoffen 地热田 2013-2014 年临时被动地震台阵采集的 MiniSEED 波形资料，监测期覆盖第一口井刺激、第二口井钻探和井测试。GFZ/GIPP 页面说明数据由 31 台 Earth Data Logger PR6-24 与 MARK-SERCEL L-4C-3D 1 Hz 三分量地震仪采集，关键词明确包含 enhanced geothermal system、induced seismicity 和 seismic waveform data。数据采用 CC BY-SA 4.0 许可，但需通过 GFZ 表单联系作者获取。
desc_en: The TOPASE dataset contains MiniSEED waveform data from the temporary passive seismic network deployed over the Rittershoffen geothermal field in 2013-2014, spanning stimulation of the first well, drilling of the second well and well tests. The GFZ/GIPP landing page states that the data were acquired with 31 Earth Data Logger PR6-24 systems and MARK-SERCEL L-4C-3D 1 Hz three-component seismometers, with keywords including enhanced geothermal system, induced seismicity and seismic waveform data. The dataset is licensed CC BY-SA 4.0 but requires a GFZ contact form for data transfer.
openness: GFZ DOI dataset under CC-BY-SA-4.0 with request-form transfer
evidence: GFZ/GIPP page lists DOI 10.5880/GIPP.201305.1, CC BY-SA 4.0 rights, collected dates 2013-03-01/2014-11-30, keywords for Rittershoffen, enhanced geothermal system, induced seismicity, 3-C geophones, MiniSEED and seismic waveform data, and a note that the dataset is not available for public download and users must fill in a form to contact the authors. CDGP RITD-Waveforms metadata links the ECOGI waveform record to GFZ TOPASE.
scale: site-scale temporary passive seismic waveform deployment
feature_count: 31 temporary three-component seismic stations
file_size: not publicly listed; transfer by request

name: PiSDL induced-seismicity waveform benchmark in SeisBench
provider: SeisBench / GFZ mirror / Karlsruhe Institute of Technology / ÉS-Géothermie collaborators
theme_raw: Induced-seismicity phase-picking benchmark from Canada, Switzerland, Germany and France
coverage: Canada; Switzerland; Germany; France, including Dawson-Septimus, St. Gallen, Insheim, FloodRisk, Vendenheim and Rittershoffen-related validation contexts
license: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International for the Seismica article and dataset description; SeisBench mirror exposes the data files without a separate license file in the inspected directory
formats: SeisBench HDF5 waveforms and CSV metadata
access: SeisBench dataset API and GFZ SeisBench mirror with metadata.csv and waveforms.hdf5
doi_or_citation: Heuel, Maurer, Frietsch and Rietbrock (2025), https://doi.org/10.26443/seismica.v4i2.1579
time_span: Compilation spans multiple regional induced-seismicity sources; SED low-magnitude subset covers 2009-2023; SeisBench mirror files dated 2025-08-22
notes: Accepted after v011 deferral because SeisBench 0.12 now exposes a PiSDL dataset class and the GFZ SeisBench mirror provides direct metadata.csv and waveforms.hdf5 downloads. The dataset targets induced seismicity from hydraulic-fracturing fluid injection, geothermal power plants and coal mine flooding, plus SED low-magnitude events.
desc_zh: PiSDL 是面向诱发地震相位拾取的机器学习波形基准数据集，已集成到 SeisBench，并在 GFZ SeisBench mirror 上提供 CSV 元数据和 HDF5 波形文件。SeisBench 文档说明它覆盖加拿大、瑞士、德国和法国的诱发地震，诱发机制包括水力压裂流体注入、地热电站和煤矿积水/矿井水相关活动，并提供 Dawson-Septimus、Insheim、St. Gallen、FloodRisk、Vendenheim 等子集接口。Seismica 论文说明 PhaseNet 用 171,182 条三分量波形、40,576 个事件训练，并在法国 Rittershoffen 地热场验证。
desc_en: PiSDL is a machine-learning waveform benchmark for phase picking on induced seismicity, integrated into SeisBench and exposed through the GFZ SeisBench mirror as CSV metadata and HDF5 waveform files. SeisBench documentation describes coverage across Canada, Switzerland, Germany and France, with induced events caused by hydraulic-fracturing fluid injection, geothermal power plants and coal mine flooding, and provides subset helpers for Dawson-Septimus, Insheim, St. Gallen, FloodRisk and Vendenheim. The Seismica article reports PhaseNet training with 171,182 three-component waveforms from 40,576 events and validation at the Rittershoffen geothermal site in France.
openness: open SeisBench mirror downloads; article licensed CC-BY-4.0
source_type: SeisBench waveform benchmark dataset and peer-reviewed article
evidence: SeisBench 0.12 documentation lists PiSDL as a waveform dataset and describes it as induced seismicity from Canada, Switzerland, Germany and France caused by hydraulic-fracturing fluid injection, geothermal power plants and coal mine flooding. SeisBench source code provides subset helpers for Dawson-Septimus, Insheim, St. Gallen, Switzerland, FloodRisk and Vendenheim and cites DOI 10.26443/seismica.v4i2.1579. The GFZ SeisBench mirror directory contains metadata.csv (65,742,311 bytes) and waveforms.hdf5 (37,005,951,136 bytes). The Seismica article states 171,182 three-component waveforms from 40,576 events and CC-BY-4.0 licensing.
feature_count: 171,182 three-component waveforms from 40,576 events reported in the article

name: NCEDC Calpine/Unocal Geysers microearthquake waveform archive 1989-2000
provider: Northern California Earthquake Data Center / Calpine / Unocal Geothermal Division / UC Berkeley
theme_raw: Calpine/Unocal Geysers seismic network microearthquake seismograms and index catalog
coverage: The Geysers geothermal field, California, United States
license: public NCEDC distribution; explicit open-data license not stated on inspected pages
formats: native PCQL waveform tar archives, event catalog text file, station information archives; conversion tools to AH or MiniSEED are documented
access: NCEDC landing page, assembled dataset directory and direct catalog text download
doi_or_citation: NCEDC Enhanced Geothermal Systems and Calpine/Unocal Geysers Networks page; NCEDC assembled dataset directory for /pub/assembled/geysers/
time_span: 1989-2000 waveform archives; 1995-1998 unedited event catalog index
notes: Distinct from the already cataloged GEISER 2012-2013 Geysers broadband row. The NCEDC overview states that the Calpine/Unocal Geysers network used up to 49 borehole monitoring sites and released more than 10 years of digital microearthquake seismograms for archiving and distribution. The assembled directory exposes annual tgz files from 1989 through 2000, plus duplicate/info archives, and the catalog text file provides an unedited 1995-1998 event index with approximate times and rough hypocenters.
desc_zh: NCEDC 的 Calpine/Unocal Geysers 数据集是加州 The Geysers 地热场历史微地震波形归档，来源于 Unocal/Calpine 在地热生产区布设的井下和地表监测网络。NCEDC 页面说明该网络最多包含 49 个井下监测点，并释放了 1989-2000 年的数字微地震波形；组装目录提供逐年 tgz 波形归档，另有 1995-1998 年未编辑事件目录作为波形索引。该数据与已收录的 GEISER 2012-2013 宽频数据不同，是研究长期地热开发相关人工/诱发微震活动的重要历史数据入口。
